name: Owen Thompson
abilities: ★ Preventive Conservation — a museum conservator by trade, and the Open's keeper of records and relics: he catalogs every score and mounts every trophy (and a crocodile named Jeffery).
The Quiet Scholar. A fixture since before the records begin, quietly elite of late — net 2nd in '24, 3rd in '25 — though he cops only to "not very good at golf."
flavor: “An archive, a showroom, a lecture hall, and an inspiration — all at once.”
caption: Owen Thompson · Truffle Hogs 🐗
